description: This image displays the logo of the European Environment Agency (EEA). The logo consists of the full name "European Environment Agency" in black text, positioned to the left of a stylized graphic icon. The icon is composed of two overlapping shapes: a teal-coloured flower-like design with multiple petals on the left, and a dark blue cogwheel or gear symbol on the right, which also forms a 'C' shape in its center. The flower and cogwheel elements are interconnected, with the cogwheel partially overlaying the flower's right side.
